text_original: To know and yet (think) we do not know is the highest (attainment);
text_normalized: To know and yet (think) we do not know is the highest (attainment);

text_original: not to know (and yet think) we do know is a disease.
text_normalized: not to know (and yet think) we do know is a disease.

text_original: It is simply by being pained at (the thought of) having this disease that we are preserved from it.
text_normalized: It is simply by being pained at (the thought of) having this disease that we are preserved from it.

text_original: The sage has not the disease.
text_normalized: The sage has not the disease.

text_original: He knows the pain that would be inseparable from it, and therefore he does not have it.
text_normalized: He knows the pain that would be inseparable from it, and therefore he does not have it.
